 {"id":"bd-3dm2","title":"Fix test isolation - 215 tests fail when run together but pass individually","description":"## Problem
Running bun run test shows 215 failures, but each test file passes when run individually.

## Root Cause
Tests use mock.module to mock the database module (../db), which causes mock pollution across test files. When one test file mocks the db, other tests that run later get the stale mock instead of the real implementation.

The error sql2.toQuery is not a function is a symptom of this mock pollution.

## Evidence
- bun test handoff.service.test.ts → 24 pass
- bun test job.service.test.ts → 26 pass  
- bun test apps/gateway/src/__tests__ → 207 fail
- File dcg-pending.service.test.ts has comments acknowledging mock interference

## Potential Fixes
1. Use dependency injection instead of global mocks
2. Create isolated database instances per test file
3. Use afterEach/afterAll to restore mocks properly
4. Consider using test fixtures with proper isolation

## Files Affected
Most test files in apps/gateway/src/__tests__/","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-20T19:55:46.144261437Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-20T21:16:49.364637459Z","closed_at":"2026-01-20T21:16:49.364589619Z","close_reason":"Added afterAll(mock.restore) to all mock.module test files and ensured logger mocks include child; running bun test apps/gateway/src/__tests__ --bail=1 now only fails at dashboard widget id generation (tracked as bd-2cn8).","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3dm2","depends_on_id":"flywheel_gateway-d94","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-20T19:55:46.173882220Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3g1y","title":"Plan validation: bv plan + dependency sanity review","description":"Goal:\n- Run bv --robot-plan and validate no missing dependencies or inverted edges.\n\nDefinition of Done:\n- Plan validation note in audit artifacts with any adjustments.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:45:55.037362187Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T05:46:25.013307896Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["audit","completeness"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3g1y","depends_on_id":"bd-2bfy","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:46:22.947333042Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3g1y","depends_on_id":"bd-3oop","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:45:55.065677171Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3g1y","depends_on_id":"bd-3tog","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:46:25.013230891Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3g6l","title":"Support verified_installer metadata in setup endpoints","description":"Goal:
- Surface manifest verified_installer metadata in /setup/tools and /setup/install.

Scope:
- Include runner, args, fallback_url, run_in_tmux in tool metadata.
- For install endpoint, prefer verified_installer if present, otherwise installCommand.
- Ensure public-safe output only (no private paths).

Tests / Verification (detailed logging required):
- Contract: bd-2lvp (schema includes verified_installer).
- E2E: bd-1uog (UI reflects verified installer guidance).

Definition of Done:
- Setup endpoints reflect verified installer metadata and select correct install strategy.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:06.680666909Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T06:31:51.741830447Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["acfs","api","integration","setup"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3g6l","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:48:06.940383575Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3g6l","depends_on_id":"bd-1sz8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T04:51:27.641302632Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3g6l","depends_on_id":"bd-2v7j","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:07:51.810547213Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3g6l","depends_on_id":"bd-2xj3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T06:08:03.860977509Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
